hero.name: Runpeng Ma
hero.taglineEn: 類比 IC 與 MEMS 工程師
hero.intro: Three engineering projects spanning MEMS physical modeling and 45nm CMOS analog IC design, from COMSOL simulation to transistor-level implementation.

projects.subtitle: Three end-to-end engineering works from theory to simulation

mems.title: MEMS Optical Switch
mems.subtitle: Electrostatic-driven optical switch · Master's thesis
mems.summary: Replaced traditional torsion with SiO₂ serpentine springs, achieving 4× rotation angle. COMSOL static and dynamic simulations matched theory at 99%.

comparator.title: Rail-to-Rail Differential Comparator
comparator.subtitle: 0.9V FreePDK 45nm CMOS
comparator.summary: Complementary differential pair + folded cascode topology, achieving 26.6 ns worst-case delay under Monte Carlo and corner analysis.

opamp.title: LS-Buffer Op-Amp
opamp.subtitle: Voltage level shift ±5V → 1V
opamp.summary: Two-stage op-amp design with 78 dB DC gain, meeting all GBW, PM, and slew-rate specifications.

skills.subtitle: From device physics to transistor level
